content.full_text:
California Fair Political Practices Commission

October 18, 1990

Jeff Reich  
First Interstate Bank Building  
2030 Fresno Street, Eighth Floor  
Fresno, CA 93721

Re: Your Request for Confirmation of Telephone Advice  
Our File No. A-90-642

Dear Mr. Reich:

This letter is in response to your request for confirmation of the telephone advice provided to you on October 3, 1990, regarding contributions to a ballot measure committee under the provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1

Your letter accurately reflects our advice. The contribution limitations imposed by the Act are not applicable to contributions to ballot measure committees. Therefore, The American Ballot Committee, ID No. 842108, may make contributions in unlimited amounts to a local ballot measure committee.

We trust this letter adequately responds to your inquiry. Should you have any further questions regarding this matter, do not hesitate to call me at (916) 322-5901.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin  
Acting General Counsel

By: Blanca M. Breeze  
Counsel, Legal Division

SH:BMB:plh

1 Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section 18000, et seq. All references to regulations are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.
